title: Spicy Chicken Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy bowl filled with chicken, crunchy vegetables, and a tangy sauce. Perfect for a quick meal.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper. Bake in the oven for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook until crispy.
Add the sliced red onion and cucumber to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tomato sauce and soy sauce. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Slice the cooked chicken and add it to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes or until the chicken is well coated with the sauce.
Sprinkle the crispy fried onions and chopped cilantro over the top of the bowl.
